title: How can I have employees' private tasks?
excerpt:
I want to manage my employees’ tasks, and I want each to have access only to their own tasks. 
I saw that Enterprise has row-based permissions, but it’s too expensive. 
Can I do this with one of the other plans?

posts.author: yehoyada (yoyo)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to manage my employees’ tasks, and I want each to have access only to their own tasks.
I saw that Enterprise has row-based permissions, but it’s too expensive.
Can I do this with one of the other plans?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there! Currently, the item viewing permission you mentioned is exclusive to the Enterprise plan, and there is not another feature that would accomplish this at an item level.

A workaround, in this case, would be to separate employees’ work by boards. In other words, each employee can have their own private board with their tasks.
